title: Create : Tracks in Bogs
description: A small addon for Create that adds a portable, all-terrain vehicle on tracks that runs on solid fuel.
body:
# This mod is an addon for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

## What is it?
**Create: Tracks in Bogs** gives you the power of fast and compact travel around the world, allowing you to cover distances quickly and efficiently in a small, tracked all-terrain vehicle that you can also conveniently carry in your pocket.

![Mod Artwork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ce196b9431fa31b368e8bb00c6f7a450dc0941_0.webp)
### 
### *How to use?
- W/S — driving at front/back
- A/D — rotate
- Shift + RMB(with any furnace fuel in hand[even with modded ones]) — fuel up the Track Buggy
- Shift + RMB(with empty hand) — pick up the Track Buggy
  
Be careful! It may explode if dropped from a great height or if damaged too much.


## dependencies:
- ## [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
